Subject: Request for One-Week Extension on Contract Review

Dear [Opposing Counsel],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to respectfully request a brief extension of our current contract-review deadline by one week. The additional time would allow us to complete a thorough review of the remaining provisions and ensure that our comments are both comprehensive and constructive.

Please let me know at your earliest convenience whether this adjustment works for you and your client, or if you would prefer to discuss alternative arrangements. Thank you for your consideration, and I look forward to continuing to work together toward a successful resolution.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Subject: Request for One-Week Extension on Contract Review

Dear [Opposing Counsel],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to respectfully request a brief extension of our current contract-review deadline by one week. The additional time would allow us to complete a thorough review of the remaining provisions and ensure that our comments are both comprehensive and constructive.

Please let me know at your earliest convenience whether this adjustment works for you and your client, or if you would prefer to discuss alternative arrangements. Thank you for your consideration, and I look forward to continuing to work together toward a successful resolution.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
